statusModel.IMPLEMENTED: Implemented as local artifact or command.

gates.name: Schema Validation
gates.evidence: Validator checks template registry, block contracts, build packets, module bindings and endpoint catalog.

gates.name: Template Match
gates.evidence: Module templateId and templateVersion must resolve to template-registry.json.

gates.name: Zone Compliance
gates.evidence: Each build-packet block zone must be supported by template and block contract.

gates.name: Token Lint
gates.evidence: Raw color, spacing, shadow, radius and typography lint is not yet implemented.

gates.name: Inline Style Scan
gates.evidence: Inline style usage is known to exist and must be quarantined by an allowlist before production.

gates.name: Runtime Governance Smoke
gates.evidence: Existing PHP assurance suite covers registry and runtime governance baselines.

gates.name: WCAG Automated
gates.evidence: No axe/Playwright route gate is present in this repository baseline.

gates.name: Keyboard Navigation
gates.evidence: Keyboard paths are specified in block contracts but not executed yet.

gates.name: Screen Reader Contract
gates.evidence: Screen reader matrix is now required in contracts, but manual evidence is not attached.

gates.name: Zoom Reflow
gates.evidence: Responsive policy exists, but no screenshot/reflow gate runs at 200% and 400%.

gates.name: Density Matrix
gates.evidence: Density modes are declared in template registry; visual proof is not automated.

gates.name: Dark Mode Smoke
gates.evidence: Runtime assurance covers theme registry presence; route-level screenshot evidence remains future work.

gates.name: Permission Negative Test
gates.evidence: Existing module access smoke validates role policy behavior.

gates.name: Audit Trail
gates.evidence: Build packets declare audit events; no end-to-end audit evidence gate is attached.

gates.name: ESignature Regulated Flow
gates.evidence: Regulated e-sign flows are not yet bound to frontend module packets.

gates.name: Performance Budget
gates.evidence: Budgets are specified in build packets but not measured.

gates.name: Traceability
gates.evidence: Build packets require traceability section and contract references.

gates.name: Release Manifest
gates.evidence: Release evidence bundle is specified in backlog but not generated yet.

gates.name: Document Control
gates.evidence: Authority-role discipline is defined; DCR/approval manifest is still pending.
